query: SELECT locationId, COUNT(*) as days, MIN(saleDate) as minDate, MAX(saleDate) as maxDate, SUM(totalSales) as totalSales, SUM(labourCost) as totalLabour FROM dailySales GROUP BY locationId ORDER BY locationId;
